objective: Validate that booking creation fails deterministically when no duo (CAPTAIN + VICE_CAPTAIN) is available for the requested venue and time

seedData.description: Client with no existing non-terminal bookings
All roster slots for the requested time are already BOOKED (no availability)

payloadRules.startAt: Future ISO-8601 timestamp where no duo is available

steps.layman: Client requests a booking for a time slot where no duo is available
System validates the basic booking request

expectedBehavior: Attempt to find CAPTAIN with AVAILABLE roster slot for [startAt, endAt)
Attempt to find VICE_CAPTAIN with AVAILABLE roster slot for [startAt, endAt)
Fail to allocate duo (one or both not available)
steps.layman: System attempts duo allocation but finds no available duo

steps.expectedErrorMessage: No duo available for the requested venue and time
steps.layman: System rejects the booking with a deterministic error
Verify no companion assignments were created

steps.expectedBehavior: Existing BOOKED slots remain unchanged (no additional reservations)
steps.layman: Verify roster slot states unchanged (no partial reservations)

businessRules: Duo allocation requires both CAPTAIN and VICE_CAPTAIN
Allocation failure is deterministic (no partial booking)
System does not create booking without successful duo allocation

notes: Can vary: only captain available, only vice captain available, both unavailable
